system.notes: A jettisonable pair of external fuel tanks (1,000 L each) fitted in place of two external mounts; adds 2,000 L fuel and −1 Signature, but each extra pair costs −15 Speed (every two pairs +1 Handling). Body 1, Armor 3; a pair costs 8,000¥ (install parts 2,500¥); Avail 5/10 days; Street Index 1.25; Base Time 32 hrs. Rigger 2 p.140.
